subcodes.first_line: O thou phoenix of the divine enkindled fire! For some time past there hath been manifested a measure of tardiness and shortcoming in the sending of letters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر نار موقده الهیه چندیست که در ارسال محررات قدری فتور و قصور حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power of prayer, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @firmness in the Covenant
